design_rationale: A cinematic, premium luxury home decor aesthetic that combines the sleek storytelling of an Apple product page with the warm, cozy emotion of a gift landing page. Dark theme enhances the amber 'fire glow' of the product.

secondary_font.usage: Body text, UI elements, Buttons, Metadata

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-normal

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento-style grids for features and lifestyle images with wide gaps (gap-6 or gap-8).
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-2xl for major cards, rounded-full for buttons

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFAA00] text-black font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#FFC04D] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,170,0,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,170,0,0.5)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2C241B] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:border-[#FFAA00] hover:text-[#FFAA00] transition-all

cards.default: bg-[#121212] border border-[#2C241B] rounded-2xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden
cards.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

inputs.default: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#2C241B] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-[#FFAA00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFAA00] outline-none transition-all

animations.flicker_glow: Animate box-shadow and opacity to mimic a soft campfire flicker. Use CSS keyframes for 0%, 50%, 100% with varying spread radius and opacity (rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.2) to rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.5)).
animations.scroll_reveal: Fade up and slide up (translate-y-8) on scroll using Framer Motion.
animations.hover_effects: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and increased amber glow shadow for interactive elements.

sections_guidelines.hero: Cinematic full-height (min-h-[90vh]). Pure black background. Large product image in center with intense amber glow behind it. Headline 'Bring the Campfire Glow Home' in Marcellus. Primary CTA. Down arrow indicator.
sections_guidelines.story: Text-heavy editorial section. 'Scrollytelling' vibe. Use charcoal brown container with glowing borders. Focus on the emotion of cozy nights.
sections_guidelines.youtube_embed: Vertical layout. Frame the video inside a stylized phone mockup with a glowing amber border to emphasize the mobile-first/Shorts origin.
sections_guidelines.how_its_made: 6-step vertical timeline on mobile, horizontal or alternating zigzag on desktop. Show 3D printing process to final glow.
sections_guidelines.features: Bento grid with 8 cards. Icons should be in amber. Dark surface backgrounds.
sections_guidelines.lifestyle: Masonry or grid of 8 images showing different use cases. Overlay text on hover. Ensure overlay opacity is max bg-black/50 to let images breathe.
sections_guidelines.gallery: Horizontal scroll or swipeable carousel of high-res images.
sections_guidelines.specs: Clean, high-contrast dark table with 1px border-[#2C241B]. Minimalist.
sections_guidelines.offers: 3 pricing tiers side-by-side. 'Couple Pack' should be highlighted with a 'Best Value' badge and a stronger glowing border.
sections_guidelines.sticky_atc: Fixed bottom bar on mobile with price and 'Add to Cart' button. Appears after scrolling past the hero. On desktop, use a floating CTA.
sections_guidelines.reviews: Masonry grid of customer reviews. 5-star icons in gold.
sections_guidelines.faq: Accordion style. Border-bottom only, clean minimalist tech aesthetic.
sections_guidelines.checkout: Frictionless form. Keep the dark luxury theme. Floating order summary on right (desktop).
sections_guidelines.admin: Dashboard with deep dark theme. Cardless styling or subtle 1px borders. Charts using recharts with amber/gold lines.

mobile_first.strategy: Optimize for one-handed use. Large tap targets (min 44px). Sticky bottom Add to Cart is crucial. Optimize font sizes to avoid horizontal scrolling.
mobile_first.youtube_shorts: Prominently display the vertical video as it's the main traffic driver. Ensure it auto-plays if possible or has a highly visible custom play button.

testing.attributes: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta"`, `data-testid="offer-couple-pack-btn"`). Convention: kebab-case, role-based.

image_urls.description: Sleek gaming desk in the dark
